name: Document Creator Agent
description: Autonomously plans and generates formatted documents (PPTX, DOCX, XLSX) with embedded charts, tabular data, and structured layouts based on natural language briefs.

skills.name: Generate Document
skills.description: Determine format, plan content, and generate a PPTX, DOCX, or XLSX file.
examples: Create a 5-slide pitch deck for a fintech startup
Write a competitive analysis report on project management tools as a DOCX
Build a sales tracker for Q1 with columns for rep name, revenue, and attainment
